use_cases: Displaying variable-height cards or images in a Pinterest-style masonry grid
Creating responsive image galleries that adapt from 1 to 5 columns based on viewport
Building portfolio or showcase layouts for creative portfolios
Organizing product grids for e-commerce with items of different heights
Structuring blog post or content card layouts with break-inside-avoid preservation
ai_summary: A responsive masonry layout component that arranges variable-height content items into adaptive columns using Tailwind CSS column utilities. The layout shifts from single-column on mobile to five columns on extra-large screens, with break-inside-avoid handling to prevent content from splitting across column boundaries. Designed for use cases requiring Pinterest-style galleries, product grids, or content showcases with items of inconsistent heights.
